claim_safety.purpose: stress-test whether matched-cell controls are more informative than simple local projections
claim_safety.not_a_claim: not SOTA, not equal-cost deployment, not a trained mitigation, not a replacement for the frozen HARD V3 main claim gate
claim_safety.statistical_unit: base-level HARD V3 diagnostics reused from the main protocol

runs.claim_safety: matched-cell estimator ablation; exploratory unless preregistered

claim_safety.matching: raw and wrapped primary attack records paired by id; neutral controls matched within each run by base_id, pressure_layout, pressure_format
claim_safety.interpretation: positive paired mean attenuation means the post-hoc/test-time matched-neutral estimator reduced the average HARD V3 gap over paired bases
claim_safety.not_a_claim: not single-pass robustness, not trained PACT, not deployable-model SOTA, and not equal-cost comparison against raw one-pass baselines
